page.notfound.subtitle: PAGE NOT FOUND
page.notfound.description: The page you are looking for has been lost in Martian space. It may have been moved, deleted, or never existed in this galaxy.

viz.slice.empty: Select a dataset, a variable, a timestep and an altitude level, then click Visualize.
viz.timeseries.empty: Select a dataset, a variable, a lat/lon point and an altitude level, then click Analyze.
viz.profile.empty: Select a dataset, a variable, a lat/lon point and a timestep, then click Launch.
viz.crosssection.empty: Select a dataset, a variable, a section type and a fixed coordinate, then click Launch.
viz.animation.empty: Select a dataset, a variable and an altitude level, then click Load animation.
viz.martian_sol_note: 1 Martian sol ≈ 24 h 37 min — time axis normalized to 24 h
explore.toggle.anomaly: Zonal anomaly mode (deviation from latitudinal mean)
explore.toggle.log: Logarithmic scale (log10 — useful for low-value variables like dust)
home.solarCaption: Speeds proportional to real orbital periods · Click a planet to see its details · Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom
home.featuresSubtitle: Six complementary visualization modes to explore every dimension of the Martian atmosphere.
home.carouselSubtitle: HiRISE orbital views, surface panoramas and full planet — curated gallery from NASA's image library.
home.carouselSource: Source: NASA Image & Video Library · HiRISE orbital views, Perseverance surface, globe · NASA public domain
home.statsSubtitle: The Martian atmosphere in perspective — for each data point, its Earth counterpart.
home.timelineSubtitle: From Mariner 4 to Perseverance — over 60 years of robotic exploration of the Red Planet.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to explore the atmosphere of Mars?
solar.clickHint: Click a planet to see its details
